name_cn:
Premium Grade Fendi Replica
💗Fendi new Spring/Summer canvas tote. The beige canvas is lightweight, giving this bag a unique charm. The classic embroidered large LOGO paired with resin double handles is a highlight. Shoulder or hand carry is effortless, and the capacity is super super large~~size 36×13×32cm
Model 372s Beige
